label: clean_technical_ending
text: The function accepts two arguments: a connection string and a timeout in milliseconds. It returns a promise that resolves with the query result. If the connection drops, the retry logic kicks in after 500ms.

label: clean_direct_answer
text: You need to add the --recursive flag. Without it, the command only processes the top-level directory. The nested folders are silently skipped.

label: clean_narrative_ending
text: We shipped the fix on Tuesday. The error rate dropped from 12% to 0.3% within the hour. The on-call engineer went back to sleep.

label: clean_mid_response_closing
text: I hope this helps clarify the architecture. Now, the second part of your question about caching is more nuanced. The cache invalidation strategy depends on whether you are using write-through or write-behind. Write-through is simpler but slower on writes.

label: sloppy_hope_helps
text: To fix the import error, change the path from relative to absolute. Use the full module path starting from the project root. I hope this helps!

label: sloppy_let_me_know
text: The database migration should be run before deploying the new API version. Make sure to back up the production database first. Let me know if you have any questions!

label: sloppy_good_luck
text: Start with the official tutorial, then work through the exercises in chapter 3. The exercises build on each other so do them in order. Good luck!

label: sloppy_summary_filler
text: The three options are EC2, Lambda, and Fargate. EC2 gives you full control, Lambda is event-driven, and Fargate sits in between. In summary, choose based on how much infrastructure you want to manage.

label: edge_specific_next_step
text: I refactored the authentication module to use JWT tokens instead of session cookies. The tests pass locally but the CI pipeline has not run yet. Let me know if you have any questions about the token expiration logic, and I can walk through the refresh flow.

label: edge_actionable_offer
text: The configuration file needs three changes: update the host, change the port, and add the SSL cert path. I updated all three in the PR. I hope this helps you unblock the staging deployment.

label: control_single_sentence
text: Use git rebase instead of git merge to keep a linear history.
